---
title: "Duplicate Objective IDs"
description: "A fixture for duplicate explicit objective IDs."
audience: "Authors"
duration: "5 minutes"
level: "beginner"
---

## Overview

Two objectives intentionally use the same explicit identifier.

## Learning Objectives

- [same-objective] Explain the first meaning.
- [same-objective] Explain the second meaning.

## Section: Duplicate IDs

The validator should point to both objective source lines.

## Key Takeaways

- Objective identifiers must be unique within a lecture.
